filament.template: Create a new Filament feature: Model, Migration, Resource, Tests. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/make-filament-feature.md for detailed procedures. Follow rules in ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/rules/01-tall-stack.md

seed.template: Generate Laravel Factories with realistic relational data using Faker. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/generate-seeders.md for patterns.

debug.template: Debug application errors. Read storage/logs/laravel.log, analyze stack trace, propose fix. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/debug-laravel.md for debugging workflow. Follow rules in ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/rules/01-tall-stack.md

audit-db.template: Audit database schema for missing indexes, N+1 queries, normalization issues. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/audit-db.md for audit checklist. Do NOT modify existing migrations.

test.template: Run the full test suite with coverage. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/run-tests.md for test procedures and ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/write-tests.md for writing new tests. Show failures and suggest fixes.

make-migration.template: Create a new Laravel migration. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/make-migration.md for schema patterns. Follow database rules in ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/rules/01-tall-stack.md

make-service.template: Create a new Laravel Service class. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/make-service.md for structure patterns.

make-observer.template: Create a new Eloquent Observer. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/make-observer.md for conventions.

make-policy.template: Create a Laravel Policy for authorization. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/make-policy.md for policy patterns.

make-job.template: Create a Laravel Job class (queued or synchronous). Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/make-job.md for job structure.

sys-update.template: Update Arch Linux system packages using pacman/yay. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/update-arch.md for update workflow. Check news first with pacman -Pn.

sys-service.template: Manage systemd services. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/systemd.md for service management patterns. Use systemctl for start/stop/enable/disable/status.

sys-packages.template: Install or remove packages with pacman or yay (AUR). Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/pacman.md for package management patterns. Search first.

sys-logs.template: Read system logs with journalctl. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/journalctl.md for log analysis patterns. Show errors or specific service logs.

sys-stats.template: Check system resource usage: CPU, memory, disk, processes. Reference ~/.config/opencode/kb/global/skills/system-stats.md for diagnostics patterns. Use htop for interactive.

init-workspace.template: Initialize AI workspace in current project: copy KB, create agent configs, set up stow symlinks, create .gitignore entries following ~/.config/opencode/commands/init-workspace.md

debug.description: Debug application errors. Reads logs, analyzes stack traces, finds root cause.

test.description: Write and run tests. Creates test cases, runs suite, reports failures.

code-reviewer.description: Reviews code for best practices, security, and potential issues

plan.description: Architecture and planning. Analyzes requirements, designs solutions, produces spec. No code execution.
